concerns.text: T019 (power analysis script) is placed in Phase 2 (Foundational) but references src/analysis/power_analysis.py which belongs to the analysis module. Power analysis depends on analysis infrastructure and should be in Phase 4 or 5, not Phase 2 which blocks all user stories.

T038 (dataset scarcity contingency gating logic) is placed after T034 (meta-analysis implementation). The gating logic must precede the meta-analysis task to determine whether meta-analysis should proceed at all.
T046 (quickstart.md validation) is placed before T047 (final report template). Validation of FR traceability should occur after the final report template is created, not before.
T005 (data directory structure) is placed after T004 (Docker configuration). Docker volume mounts for fMRIPrep require the data directory structure to exist first; T005 should precede T004.
T006 (logging infrastructure) is placed after T007 (configuration management). Configuration management typically uses logging for setup diagnostics; T006 should precede T007.
T010 (OpenNeuro API client) is marked [P] parallel-safe but depends on T009 (environment variable management for API keys). The [P] tag is incorrect; T010 must follow T009.
T016 (Nilearn fallback) and T013 (fMRIPrep runner) are in the same phase but represent alternative approaches. Consider clarifying whether T016 depends on T013 completion or is truly independent.
